channel.title: Software on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Software on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: Apple Responds to Epic
item.description: Apple says Epic's arguments against pausing the case are wrong, as reported by tech experts like Marcus Mendes, a Brazilian tech podcaster and journalist.

item.title: WhatsApp's iCloud Alternative
item.description: WhatsApp building own iCloud alternative for chat backups, a move to enhance user data management

item.title: Apple News and Reviews
item.description: Get the latest Apple news, reviews, and updates on iPhone, Mac, and other products

item.title: 9to5Mac News Summary
item.description: 9to5Mac news summary and Apple related updates

item.title: 9to5Mac Daily News Recap
item.description: Get the latest news from 9to5Mac, including Apple updates and more.

item.title: Spotify Chatbot for Music
item.description: Spotify introduces a chatbot for Premium users to discuss music, podcasts, and books, enhancing the user experience.

item.title: Google Gemini in Chrome UK
item.description: Google rolls out Gemini for Chrome in the UK with AI features and integration

item.title: X Algorithm Update Prioritizes Replies
item.description: X's algorithm update aims to make replies feel less like a battleground

item.title: Spotify Introduces Talk Feature
item.description: Spotify launches Talk to Spotify, a new beta feature for controlling the app with voice or text commands.

item.title: Google Images Turns 25
item.description: Google Images gets a makeover for its 25th anniversary with real-time results

item.title: Luddite Festival Challenges Tech
item.description: The Summer of Ludd festival promotes a movement against tech's negative impact on society

item.title: Google Chat Tips
item.description: Get the most out of Google Chat with these tips and features

item.title: Plex vs Jellyfin: Media Centers
item.description: Plex's recent design choices prioritize ad-supported streaming, leaving users seeking alternatives like Jellyfin for personal media collection and DVR functionality.

item.title: New York Enacts Data Center Moratorium
item.description: New York Governor signs executive order for statewide data center moratorium, citing environmental concerns and energy impact

item.title: X Algorithm Fix
item.description: X's algorithm was missing data, leading to a battleground feel on the site, and a tweak will boost visibility of posts to mutuals.

item.title: Spotify AI Chatbot Launched
item.description: Spotify launches AI chatbot for Premium subscribers to interact with music, audiobooks, and podcasts

item.title: Google Images Turns 25
item.description: Google Images announces a significant change to its homepage in honor of its 25th anniversary with a new browseable feature

item.title: Uber Expands Services Beyond Ride-Hailing
item.description: Uber expands beyond ride-hailing with new features and services, including hotel bookings and boat rentals.

item.title: Superhuman's AI Email Replies
item.description: Superhuman's new auto-draft feature improves AI-generated email replies with frontier models from Anthropic and Open AI.

item.title: Spotify AI Music Assistant
item.description: Spotify expands AI push with ChatGPT-like music assistant for mobile devices

item.title: iOS 27 Public Beta Released
item.description: Apple's latest iOS 27 public beta release brings new features and improvements

item.title: Apple Updates Child Safety Features
item.description: Apple is updating its child safety features in iOS 27, iPad OS 27, and macOS 27.

item.title: TurboTax Discounts Unveiled
item.description: TurboTax offers discounts and promotions for the 2026 tax season, including 10% off Federal online tax filings and 20% off TurboTax Live Assisted.

item.title: Vimeo Promo Codes July
item.description: Get up to 40% off Vimeo plans with promo codes and discounts in July 2026 for video creators and businesses.

item.title: We Ward App Locks
item.description: Venus Williams-backed We Ward app launches Walking Mode feature to promote healthier habits

item.title: Vermilion Cliffs Ventures Fund II
item.description: Ashley Smith announces $25m Fund II for Vermilion Cliffs Ventures to back AI and security startups

item.description: Federal workers unable to remove White House app from phones due to security concerns

item.description: Get the latest news on Verge subscription updates and Amazon Prime Day deals

item.description: Ribbie turns real-time baseball stats into arcade-like broadcasts with pixel art

item.description: Anthropic's Claude Tag learns your company one Slack message at a time with AI teammate

item.description: Open AI launches initiative to find and patch open source bugs with Trail of Bits

item.description: Major tech companies cite AI as reason for layoffs despite record revenues

item.description: Discover the new features and updates in iOS 27's Find My app

item.description: Apple AirPods to receive customizable EQ and more in iOS 27

item.title: Apple iOS 27 Beta Released
item.description: Apple releases second developer beta for iOS 27 and macOS 27, featuring new updates and improvements

item.title: Vision OS 27 Beta Unveiled: Siri AI, Spatial Worlds, and Curved Realities
item.description: Apple's Vision OS 27 beta introduces Siri AI, immersive spatial environments, and redesigned UI elements. Developers can test the update via Settings. This preview highlights key features shaping Apple's spatial computing future.

item.description: Apple Seeds tvOS 27 Beta 2 to Developers for Testing Purposes

item.description: Apple adds new Insights feature to Wallet app in iOS 27 beta 2

item.description: Exploring the latest Apple news, updates, and innovations in tech industry

item.description: Fantastical tackles double booking with granular control and common sense solutions

item.description: Apple releases new updates and features for iPhone and Mac users

item.title: macOS 27 Golden Gate: Beta 2 Unveils Hidden Gems
item.description: Explore macOS 27 Golden Gate Beta 2’s groundbreaking features, performance boosts, and hidden tools reshaping Apple’s ecosystem.

item.description: Explore Apple’s latest updates through 9to5Mac—detailed analysis of iPad Pro, VisionOS, macOS tweaks, and insider insights into Apple’s ecosystem.

item.title: Apple Siri Tech Insights
item.description: Explore Apple's Siri technology and its impact on smart home devices

item.title: Instagram TV App
item.description: Instagram for TV app now available on Samsung TVs in US, watch reels and stories on TV

item.title: Tesla Autopilot Crash in Texas: Autonomy, Safety, and Legal Fallout
item.description: A Tesla Model 3 with Autopilot engaged crashed into a Texas home, killing a woman. Authorities confirm the driver was using automated driving assistance. The incident raises questions about AV safety and Tesla's regulatory compliance.

item.title: OpenAI Unveils Patch
item.description: OpenAI launches effort to patch open-source bugs with AI

item.title: Instagram Takes On Streaming
item.description: Instagram explores new formats for TV app, targets streaming services

item.title: Meta Bets Big on India: WhatsApp’s New Chief & $900M CRED Deal
item.description: Meta appoints Kunal Shah as WhatsApp’s new chief and invests $900M in CRED, signaling a strategic push into India’s fintech and messaging markets.

item.title: iPadOS 27: Siri AI and System Enhancements
item.description: Explore iPadOS 27's Siri AI upgrades, system optimizations, and how they impact power users and workflows.

item.title: iOS 27 Introduces Mac-Style Recovery Mode for iPhone and iPad
item.description: iOS 27 brings Mac-like recovery mode to iPhone and iPad, offering on-device repairs without a computer. Explore the new features and implications.

item.description: Get the latest Apple news and updates from 9to5Mac

item.description: Discover the hidden dangers of vibe-coded websites and how to protect yours from SQL injection risks

item.title: Seedcamp Raises $320M
item.description: Seedcamp raises $320M for new fund to expand US footprint and invest in startups

item.title: Polymarket Fake Bets Scandal
item.description: Polymarket pays people to create fake bet videos on social media, deceiving users with staged wins

item.description: Discover the new AI features in iOS 27, from bill splitting to password security

item.description: Discover the latest iOS 27 features, from smarter bill splitting to improved Apple Maps, and learn how they'll enhance your iPhone experience

item.description: Discover the latest tech trends and innovations in our in-depth analysis

item.title: Colors Unleashed
item.description: Google Calendar expands color options for events, offering up to 200 custom colors for better organization and personalization.

item.title: AI Boost
item.description: Adobe updates Firefly AI, adds it to Premiere, Illustrator, InDesign, and Frame.io for enhanced creativity

item.title: Regain Control
item.description: Discover how people are taking back control of their time, lives, and attention in the digital age with new tech trends

item.title: How to turn off AI in your Google Docs
item.description: Learn how to turn off AI in Google Docs and eliminate Gemini pop-ups, giving you full control over your writing experience in this step-by-step guide.
